message:
fix: HeaderMap O(1) lookup, race winner_idx dead code, stream idiom cleanup, oracle tracing, reactor destructure

HeaderMap (src/http/body.rs):

  Add a positions: DetHashMap<HeaderName, Vec<usize>> index alongside the
  existing headers Vec for O(1) name lookups. Previously get() did a
  linear scan. insert() now removes existing entries by index (reverse
  order to preserve positions), calls rebuild_positions(), and appends.
  append() maintains the index incrementally. rebuild_positions() is only
  called after insert-with-removal, not on every operation.

  Tests added: header_map_append_get_returns_first_duplicate verifies
  get() returns the first appended value;
  header_map_insert_rebuilds_indices_after_removal verifies index
  integrity after insert displaces multiple entries.

Race winner selection (src/cx/scope.rs):

  Remove dead winner_idx variable and redundant early-return check in
  the race poll loop. The variable was set but the only read was an
  unreachable branch — the Ready return on the line below makes the
  re-check on the next iteration impossible since poll_fn completes.

Stream peekable (src/stream/peekable.rs):

  Replace if-let-else with let-else pattern for the PeekSlot::Item
  extraction. The match arm already established that peeked is Item(_),
  so the else branch was unreachable — let-else makes this explicit.

Stream zip (src/stream/zip.rs):

  Replace if-let destructure of two Options with direct .take().unwrap()
  calls, since the surrounding if-guard already confirmed both are Some.

Oracle tracing (src/lab/oracle/mod.rs):

  Replace tracing::info! with crate::tracing_compat::info! to use the
  project's deterministic tracing shim. Remove intermediate details
  variable — inline the unwrap_or("clean") into the macro call.

Lab reactor (src/runtime/reactor/lab.rs):

  Change next_sequence destructure binding from move to ref mut in the
  LabInner pattern. This fixes a potential move-out-of-borrowed-struct
  issue when the field is used after the destructure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
